comment: [#17 Seam A — 2026-07] Checklist/inspection completion → weekly progress report. This form is
NOT manually filled: on completion of an admin-assigned inspection the assignee signs off and the
Worker (POST /api/fieldops/checklist/instance/:id/submit) SYNTHESIZES a submission under this
form_code that rides the EXISTING intake → progress-week-sheet → weekly-compile pipeline (a
standard submission the built pipeline files — NOT a new §51 SoR write-route). Catalog category is
'progress' (commercial, not safety). Net-new form (editor-authored posture): source_pdf is empty
— no reference PDF exists (the material-incident-v1 / photo-test-v1 precedent). The header
signature field is REQUIRED content: it satisfies the required-content default floor
(defaults_for_new_identities.required_signature_inputs_min = 1) for this brand-new parent, so no
Seth-owned required-content.json entry is needed. The EMIT payload files values.signature =
<base64/SVG> to match this header signature field, values.items = [{label, status, note}] to match
the repeating table, and checklist_title / assignee_name to the header (work_date rides the
submission envelope). Ships DARK behind the Worker var CHECKLIST_PROGRESS_LOGGING_ENABLED.
